commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cc542548a08a42eb950a393f7f7223c3af0aafe0)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes ACP runtime-option handling to avoid replaying startup model/thinking as post-start config controls and strips Claude model/thinking options on spawn, initialize, and restart paths with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +80, Tests +425. Total +505 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and supplied live logs. Current main can send startup model/thinking again as ACP config controls, and the PR body includes redacted before-fix Claude ACP failures plus an after-fix live smoke.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to choose the Claude ACP model/thinking contract and whether to repair this branch or route the policy through the ACPX-owned related work.

target.title: fix(acp): strip chat options for Claude ACP sessions
target.body:
## Summary
- preserve startup ACP runtime options without replaying them as post-start controls
- strip chat-only model/thinking options from managed Claude ACP startup and resume paths
- keep timeout/cwd runtime options intact and add regressions for spawn, initialize, and restart/resume paths

## Tests
- node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/acp-spawn.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.initialize-session.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-handles.test.ts
- pnpm tsgo:core:all

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed:** Managed Claude ACP sessions should not fail because OpenClaw forwards chat/runtime controls such as model or thinking/effort as post-start Claude ACP config options. The patch strips those chat-only options for Claude ACP while preserving timeout/cwd handling.

- **Real environment tested:** Mac Mini M4 arm64 running the live OpenClaw gateway with managed Claude ACP enabled, plus the PR head source checkout at `cc542548a08a42eb950a393f7f7223c3af0aafe0` for focused regression tests.

- **Exact steps or command run after the patch:**
  1. Ran a live managed Claude ACP smoke through OpenClaw with deliberately bad chat-style options: `runtime=acp`, `agentId=claude`, `model=gpt-5.5`, `thinking=off`, task `Reply exactly ACP_SMOKE_OK and stop`.
  2. Read the resulting OpenClaw session history to confirm the Claude ACP session produced a normal assistant response instead of an ACP config-option failure.
  3. Ran the PR-head regression command: `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/acp-spawn.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.initialize-session.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-handles.test.ts`.

- **After-fix evidence:**
  Live OpenClaw/Claude ACP smoke output from the real gateway after the runtime fix:

  ```text
  openclaw sessions_spawn runtime=acp agentId=claude model=gpt-5.5 thinking=off task="Reply exactly ACP_SMOKE_OK and stop"
  status: accepted

  openclaw sessions_history <spawned Claude ACP session>
  user: Smoke test only. Reply exactly ACP_SMOKE_OK and stop. Do not inspect files or run commands.
  assistant: ACP_SMOKE_OK
  ```

  Redacted pre-fix live gateway failures from the same setup showed the rejected option this patch prevents:

  ```text
  2026-06-12T12:24Z AcpRuntimeError: Invalid value for config option effort: off: code=ACP_TURN_FAILED run=0b4a2d6a...
  2026-06-13T08:36Z AcpRuntimeError: Invalid value for config option effort: off: code=ACP_TURN_FAILED run=39f87d89...
  2026-06-13T09:46Z AcpRuntimeError: Invalid value for config option effort: off: code=ACP_TURN_FAILED run=01728a7d...
  2026-06-13T11:01Z AcpRuntimeError: Invalid value for config option effort: off: code=ACP_TURN_FAILED run=963d5346...
  ```

- **Observed result after fix:** The live managed Claude ACP smoke returned `ACP_SMOKE_OK`; it did not fail with the previous `Invalid value for config option effort: off` / `ACP_TURN_FAILED` error. On PR head `cc542548a08a42eb950a393f7f7223c3af0aafe0`, the focused regression command passed 86 tests across the three ACP/spawn test files, including the Claude-specific cases for stripping model/thinking before initialise and avoiding first-turn replay of startup model/thinking.

- **What was not tested:** I did not replace/restart the full installed gateway from this PR branch during the PR steward pass. The live smoke proves the same managed-Claude-ACP failure mode is fixed in the running OpenClaw setup; the PR-head test run proves this branch contains the matching ACP/spawn regression coverage.
target.author: moeedahmed

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
